---
title: "Tic-Tac-Toe"
---

## About the Game

This is a Tic-Tac-Toe game I built using Processing. The player can play against the computer and switch between different difficulty levels.

## How to Play

Click on an open square to place your move.

### Controls

- Press **E** for easy mode
- Press **H** for hard mode
- Press **R** to reset the game

## Play the Game

```{=html}
<iframe 
  src="./index.html"
  width="700"
  height="750"
  style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 10px;">
</iframe>
```
